title: Share Genie Spaces externally using OpenSharing (Beta) ​
body:
**June 17, 2026**

Providers can now share a Genie Space with users outside their organization using OpenSharing. Databricks creates a point-in-time snapshot of the space's data assets and instructions. Recipients can mount the share to create a local Genie Space. See [Share a Genie Agent using OpenSharing](/aws/en/opensharing/share-genie-space).

ref_links.text: Share a Genie Agent using OpenSharing
